verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Dilexi, quoniam exaudiet Dominus  vocem orationis meæ.
verses.douay_rheims: I have loved, because the Lord will hear the voice of my prayer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitä minä rakastan, että Herra kuulee minun rukoukseni äänen;
verses.king_james: I love the Lord, because he hath heard my voice and my supplications.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia inclinavit aurem suam mihi,  et in diebus meis invocabo.
verses.douay_rheims: Because he hath inclined his ear unto me: and in my days I will call upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että hän korvansa kallistaa minun puoleeni; sentähden minä avukseni huudan häntä elinaikanani.
verses.king_james: Because he hath inclined his ear unto me, therefore will I call upon him as long as I live.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdederunt me dolores mortis ;  et pericula inferni invenerunt me.  Tribulationem et dolorem inveni,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲפָפ֤וּנִי ׀ חֶבְלֵי־מָ֗וֶת וּמְצָרֵ֣י שְׁא֣וֹל מְצָא֑וּנִי צָרָ֖ה וְיָג֣וֹן אֶמְצָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sorrows of death have compassed me: and the perils of hell have found me. I met with trouble and sorrow:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuoleman paulat ovat minun piirittäneet, ja helvetin ahdistukset ovat minun löytäneet: minä tulin vaivaan ja tuskaan.
verses.king_james: The sorrows of death compassed me, and the pains of hell gat hold upon me: I found trouble and sorrow.

verses.latin_vulgate: et nomen Domini invocavi :  o Domine, libera animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְשֵֽׁם־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֶקְרָ֑א אָנָּ֥ה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה מַלְּטָ֥ה נַפְשִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I called upon the name of the Lord. O Lord, deliver my soul.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä avukseni huudan Herran nimeä: o Herra, pelasta minun sieluni!
verses.king_james: Then called I upon the name of the Lord; O Lord, I beseech thee, deliver my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misericors Dominus et justus,  et Deus noster miseretur.
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is merciful and just, and our God sheweth mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on armollinen ja vanhurskas, ja meidän Jumalamme on laupias.
verses.king_james: Gracious is the Lord, and righteous; yea, our God is merciful.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodiens parvulos Dominus ;  humiliatus sum, et liberavit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֹׁמֵ֣ר פְּתָאיִ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה דַּ֝לֹּתִ֗י וְלִ֣י יְהוֹשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is the keeper of little ones: I was humbled, and he delivered me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra kätkee yksinkertaiset: kuin minä olin kovin vaivattu, niin hän minua autti.
verses.king_james: The Lord preserveth the simple: I was brought low, and he helped me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertere, anima mea, in requiem tuam,  quia Dominus benefecit tibi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁוּבִ֣י נַ֭פְשִׁי לִמְנוּחָ֑יְכִי כִּֽי־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה גָּמַ֥ל עָלָֽיְכִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Turn, O my soul, into thy rest: for the Lord hath been bountiful to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Palaja taas, minun sieluni, sinun lepoos; sillä Herra tekee hyvästi sinulle.
verses.king_james: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for the Lord hath dealt bountifully with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia eripuit animam meam de morte,  oculos meos a lacrimis,  pedes meos a lapsu.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י חִלַּ֥צְתָּ נַפְשִׁ֗י מִ֫מָּ֥וֶת אֶת־עֵינִ֥י מִן־דִּמְעָ֑ה אֶת־רַגְלִ֥י מִדֶּֽחִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For he hath delivered my soul from death: my eyes from tears, my feet from falling.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä olet sieluni temmannut pois kuolemasta, silmäni kyynelistä, jalkani kompastuksesta.
verses.king_james: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.

verses.douay_rheims: I will please the Lord in the land of the living.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä vaellan Herran edessä eläväin maassa.
verses.king_james: I will walk before the Lord in the land of the living.

verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Credidi, propter quod locutus sum ;  ego autem humiliatus sum nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶ֭אֱמַנְתִּי כִּ֣י אֲדַבֵּ֑ר אֲ֝נִ֗י עָנִ֥יתִי מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have believed, therefore have I spoken; but I have been humbled exceedingly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä uskon, sentähden minä puhun; mutta minä sangen vaivataan.
verses.king_james: I believed, therefore have I spoken: I was greatly afflicted:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego dixi in excessu meo :  Omnis homo mendax.
verses.douay_rheims: I said in my excess: Every man is a liar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä sanoin hämmästyksessä: kaikki ihmiset ovat valehteliat.
verses.king_james: I said in my haste, All men are liars.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid retribuam Domino  pro omnibus quæ retribuit mihi ?
verses.douay_rheims: What shall I render to the Lord, for all the things that he hath rendered to me?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka minä maksan Herralle kaikki hänen hyvät tekonsa, jotka hän minulle teki?
verses.king_james: What shall I render unto the Lord for all his benefits toward me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Calicem salutaris accipiam,  et nomen Domini invocabo.
verses.douay_rheims: I will take the chalice of salvation; and I will call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä otan sen autuaallisen kalkin, ja saarnaan Herran nimeä.
verses.king_james: I will take the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vota mea Domino reddam  coram omni populo ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: I will pay my vows to the Lord before all his people:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä maksan lupaukseni Herralle kaiken hänen kansansa edessä.
verses.king_james: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pretiosa in conspectu Domini  mors sanctorum ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen pyhäinsä kuolema on kallis Herran edessä.
verses.king_james: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.

verses.latin_vulgate: O Domine, quia ego servus tuus ;  ego servus tuus, et filius ancillæ tuæ.  Dirupisti vincula mea :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנָּ֣ה יְהֹוָה֮ כִּי־אֲנִ֢י עַ֫בְדֶּ֥ךָ אֲֽנִי־עַ֭בְדְּךָ בֶּן־אֲמָתֶ֑ךָ פִּ֝תַּ֗חְתָּ לְמֽוֹסֵרָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord, for I am thy servant: I am thy servant, and the son of thy handmaid. Thou hast broken my bonds:
verses.finnish_biblia: O Herra! minä olen sinun palvelias, minä olen sinun palvelias, sinun piikas poika: sinä olet minun siteeni vallallensa päästänyt.
verses.king_james: O Lord, truly I am thy servant; I am thy servant, and the son of thine handmaid: thou hast loosed my bonds.

verses.latin_vulgate: tibi sacrificabo hostiam laudis,  et nomen Domini invocabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽךָ־אֶ֭זְבַּח זֶ֣בַח תּוֹדָ֑ה וּבְשֵׁ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה אֶקְרָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will sacrifice to thee the sacrifice of praise, and I will call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä uhraan sinulle kiitosuhria, ja Herran nimeä saarnaan.
verses.king_james: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vota mea Domino reddam  in conspectu omnis populi ejus ;
verses.douay_rheims: I will pay my vows to the Lord in the sight of all his people:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä maksan Herralle lupaukseni kaiken hänen kansansa edessä,
verses.king_james: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people,

verses.latin_vulgate: in atriis domus Domini,  in medio tui, Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּחַצְר֤וֹת ׀ בֵּ֤ית יְהֹוָ֗ה בְּֽת֘וֹכֵ֤כִי יְֽרוּשָׁלָ֗͏ִם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In the courts of the house of the Lord, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran huoneen esikartanoissa, keskellä sinua, Jerusalem. Halleluja!
verses.king_james: In the courts of the Lord’s house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
